name: Wcm Global Growth Limited
analysis: WQG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.9100, stop A$1.7622, target A$2.3534 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
